element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Basic enemy type; can kill player by touching; inflation with air pump establishes core mechanic
Enhanced threat vs Pookas; dual kill conditions (touch or fire breath) adds complexity
Primary offensive tool; inflates enemies until burst; core skill introduced immediately
Secondary mechanic; creates ground faults that sink land into water; high-value but risky (can kill player)
Passive threat; sinks ground when fault lines connect; kills enemies and player if not careful; required for advanced strategy

element_introduction_order.first_appears: After three pieces of land cut off
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Risk-reward incentive; appears on remaining island; extra points for skilled play
Round closure mechanism; enemies jump into water; rewards player with round completion

typical_relief_triggers: Land successfully sunk via fault line, eliminating multiple enemies at once
Round completes when remaining enemies jump into water
typical_tension_triggers: Player trapped on island segment during fault line creation
Risk of self-damage when creating/completing fault lines
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Cyclical tension with environmental risk-reward spikes; island progressive destruction maintains escalating pressure; high difficulty noted in reviews; becomes easier with practice

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Bonus vegetables appear after land destruction milestones; optional to collect but incentivized

difficulty_curve.early_game: Moderate entry difficulty; both weapon types and enemy types introduced simultaneously; practice required to master
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Escalates through enemy count and pressure; risk-reward mechanics demand precision with fault lines
notable_spikes: Initial transition from air pump to jackhammer/fault line strategy
Multi-enemy convergence situations on shrinking island
Fygar fire breath adds spatial unpredictability

notable_level_patterns.description: Each round progressively removes land from the island via fault lines connecting to water. Three land pieces removed triggers bonus vegetable spawn. Creates natural escalation and time pressure.
notable_level_patterns.example_level: All rounds follow this pattern; island shrinkage is core loop

notable_level_patterns.description: Jackhammer creates faults at designated lines; both ends must reach water to sink land. Points scale with enemy count killed simultaneously. High risk (player can be trapped/killed) vs high reward (multi-kill bonus).
Simultaneous Pooka and Fygar presence; Fygars add ranged threat dimension (fire) while Pookas provide melee pressure. Requires spatial awareness and prioritization.
